features.name: solid_base_plate
features.description: 2mm solid floor replacing the Gridfinity base profile; provides a flat print bed surface

features.name: cavity_walls
features.description: Outer shell walls surrounding the 70x18mm pocket. Wall thickness is 6.75mm on X sides and 11.75mm on Y sides. Outer corners have 3.75mm radius, cavity corners have 2.0mm radius. Open at the top.

features.name: display_body_pocket
features.description: 70x18mm rectangular pocket with 2mm corner radius, open top; tests 1mm/side clearance for caliper display body (68x16mm)

printOrientation.z_direction: cavity opens upward — caliper inserts from above

specDeviations.reason: Volume spec increased from 50 to 55 cm^3 because v2 uses full 41.5mm bin Y extent (v1 was trimmed to 25mm), increasing solid material with the smaller pocket.
